description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant blue mesh upper with a subtle zigzag pattern and orange accents. The shoe has a rounded toe, a padded collar, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with matching blue laces. The midsole is thick and cushioned, colored in orange, and designed for comfort and shock absorption. A stylized logo of a person in motion is visible on both the side and heel, rendered in orange. The overall design suggests a lightweight, breathable, and flexible shoe suitable for urban activities.
description: A blue athletic sneaker with orange accents, mesh upper, and cushioned orange sole, featuring a dynamic logo and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, blue mesh upper, and criss-cross lacing with orange sole highlights.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the zigzag mesh pattern, orange logo, and thick orange midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel collar, pull tab with orange stripe, and orange logo on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mesh pattern, lacing, and orange sole.
attribute_logo: Stylized human figure in motion, orange, located on the side and heel.
